name: Chocolate Date Truffles
recipeIngredient: Powdered sugar, colored candies, or sprinkles
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan over very low heat, melt the chocolate chips, stirring constantly. Remove from heat and stir in the vanilla wafers, powdered sugar, yogurt, and almond extract; blend well. Stir in the dates. Refrigerate for 10 minutes to make handling easier.
2. Form the mixture into 0.5 to 1 inch balls. Roll each ball in powdered sugar and place them in a single layer in a large shallow container. Store covered in the refrigerator.
Tip: One 10 oz package of vanilla milk chocolate chips can be substituted for the chocolate chips. Substitute 0.5 tsp rum extract for the almond extract and 6 oz of dried apricots, chopped, for the dates. Prepare as directed above.
